question.string: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?animal ?operation
WHERE {
  wd:Q625657 wdt:P527 ?unit .
  ?unit wdt:P798 ?designation .
  ?unit wdt:P4624 ?squadron .
  ?squadron wdt:P3156 ?classification .
  ?unit wdt:P410 ?rank .
  ?operation wdt:P2517 ?unit .
  ?animal wdt:P3838 ?operation .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?animal wdt:P31 wd:Q5 }
}

can i play don't starve on play station 4?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?game ?platform
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q7883528 .
  ?game wdt:P400 wd:Q866331 .
  ?game wdt:P404 ?mode .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?game), "Don't Starve")

}

question.string: How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P3975 wd:Q22686 .
  FILTER (?item != wd:Q765165) .
  ?item wdt:P577 ?inception .
  FILTER (?inception < "1906-12-19"^^xsd:dateTime)
}

SELECT ?lebronJoinYear ?kobeLeaveYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q36159 p:P54 ?lebronStatement .
  ?lebronStatement ps:P54 wd:Q160426 .
  ?lebronStatement pq:P580 ?lebronJoinYear .
  wd:Q25369 p:P54 ?kobeStatement .

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?founder wdt:P112 ?tencent .
  FILTER_CONTAINS(lcase(?tencent), "tencent") .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (?count > 1)

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q19020 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy ?nextYear ?nextLifeExpectancy
WHERE {
  ?iran wdt:P298 "IR" .
  ?observation1 wdt:P793 ?iran .
  ?observation1 wdt:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy .
  ?observation1 wdt:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "1999-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  ?observation2 wdt:P793 ?iran .
  ?observation2 wdt:P2250 ?nextLifeExpectancy .
  ?observation2 wdt:P585 ?nextYear .
  FILTER (?nextYear > ?year) .
  FILTER (?nextLifeExpectancy > ?lifeExpectancy) .
}

}

  BIND(YEAR(?deadByDaylightDate) AS ?deadByDaylightYear) .
  FILTER(?year = ?deadByDaylightYear) .
  FILTER(?game != wd:Q24514682)
}

question.string: What other civilizations existed during the Aztecs ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?civilization ?civilizationLabel
WHERE {
  ?aztec wdt:P6885 ?historicalRegion .
  ?civilization wdt:P6885 ?historicalRegion .
  FILTER(?aztec != ?civilization) .
  ?aztec wdt:P172 ?ethnicGroup .
  ?civilization wdt:P172 ?ethnicGroup .
  FILTER(?aztec != ?civilization) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
  FILTER CONTAINS(LCASE(?aztec), "aztec")
}
